article_summaries.overall_summary: System audit identifies 8 findings across 5 regulatory articles. Critical structural deficiencies identified in 3 articles. Strategic intervention required.

basis: Critical findings identified in Art. 13, Art. 20.
System lacks recursive technical verification for declared compliance flags.
auditor_attestation.auditor_note: Material technical evidence gaps remain within analyzed scope. Structured remediation is recommended before auditor reliance.

limitations: External services and infrastructure not analyzed
Binary or SDK-based implementations not visible

audit_confidence.determinism_note: Semantic evaluation layers (if enabled) may introduce non-deterministic behavior. Disable via SENTINEL_LLM_PROVIDER=none for fully deterministic output.

next_step.reason: Automated scan provides technical evidence but not full system verification

audit_limitations.statement: Absence of detected signals does not guarantee absence of implementation.
audit_limitations.risk: Controls may exist outside scanned scope or via abstraction layers
audit_caveats: Compensating controls outside repository are not evaluated
Runtime system behavior is not verified
Production vs scanned code equivalence is not guaranteed

AUDIT_SCOPE.statement: This audit strictly evaluates the local codebase and declared artifacts. Any control implemented outside this boundary is not validated.

AUDIT_COVERAGE.coverage_statement: Findings are based on analysis of scanned files only. Unscanned areas are outside current audit coverage.

EVIDENCE_INTERPRETATION.negative_evidence_definition: NOT_FOUND indicates absence of expected technical signals within scanned scope, not absolute absence across entire system
EVIDENCE_INTERPRETATION.limitation: Controls implemented outside detectable patterns or outside scan boundary may not be captured
